positive: A highly stylized, continuous, symmetrical pattern of enchanted nocturnal forest fauna and celestial bodies. The composition must feature deep silhouettes of stylized owls, delicate crescent moons, geometric constellations (like Orion and Pleiades), and mythical bioluminescent mushrooms, all intertwined with smooth, clean-lined vines and ancient roots. Style should be a harmonious fusion of intricate dot-work engraving, woodcut print aesthetics, and Art Nouveau flowing lines. The overall mood is mysterious and ethereal. High contrast black ink on a pure white background, optimized for screen printing on apparel. Centralized, symmetrical, and repeating pattern element visible within the frame. Vector graphic quality, clean lines, perfect illustration.
negative: blurry, messy, poor anatomy, text, logo, watermark, signature, border, noise, gradient, photorealistic, color splash, extra limbs, low detail, abstract smudge
